# UC-12.3.17 · Ansible Fork and Timeout Saturation on Controller

## Description

Strategy timeouts and fork exhaustion slow enterprise batch remediations.

## Value

Shows when controller tuning (forks, timeout, fact gathering) needs adjustment.

## Implementation

Correlate with CPU load on execution nodes; split inventories if patterns persist.

## SPL

```spl
index=iac sourcetype="ansible:log" OR sourcetype="ansible:result"
| search "Timeout" OR "Timeout (12s)" OR "forks" OR "strategy"
| stats count by host, playbook
| where count>=15
| sort -count
```

## Visualization

Bar chart (timeouts by playbook), Table (controller host).

- [AWX logging integration (job events, activity stream)](https://github.com/ansible/awx/blob/devel/docs/logging_integration.md)
